stdout:
Upload the app to the App Directory. Uploaded apps are only visible to you (the app owner) and can only be installed to a small test subreddit with less than 200 subscribers

USAGE
  $ devvit upload [--config <value>] [--version <value> | --bump
    major|minor|patch|prerelease] [--copy-paste] [-v]

FLAGS
  -v, --verbose      Enable verbose logging
  --bump=<option>    Type of version bump (major|minor|patch|prerelease)
                     <options: major|minor|patch|prerelease>
  --config=<value>   path to devvit config file
  --copy-paste       Copy-paste the auth code instead of opening a browser
  --version=<value>  Explicit version number (e.g: 1.0.1)

DESCRIPTION
  Upload the app to the App Directory. Uploaded apps are only visible to you
  (the app owner) and can only be installed to a small test subreddit with less
  than 200 subscribers
